reads.note: repo.watchDebt(debtId) -> DebtView? (single debt joined with its customer + payment progress). Fields are drift Debt columns plus derived progress (paidAmount/remaining/status) and the embedded Customer. Money is integer kobo (S-1); ids are client UUIDv7 strings on the wire (S-2) though the drift as-built uses int autoincrement.

repo.watchPayments(debtId) -> List<Payment>, newest-first (orderBy createdAt desc). Feeds the _DebtTimeline 'Payment received/Final payment' rows and the 'Settled'/reopen logic. reference is the receipt number (OWM-xxxxx).

repo.watchDebtReminders(debtId) -> List<Reminder> (orderBy id desc). This is the reminder-HISTORY timeline: only rows with sentAt != null are rendered as 'Reminder sent' items in _DebtTimeline. This is the recorded reminder history, distinct from the ReminderSchedule card below.
repo.watchBusiness() -> BusinessProfile? consumed by _AutoReminderCard only to read the plan (limitsFor(plan).sendsPerMonth and starter-vs-paid copy). Only 'plan' is used on this screen.

READ derived from the backend reminder-engine schedule. As-built in _AutoReminderCard this is a HARDCODED 'steps' literal at lib/screens/debts/debt_detail_screen.dart lines 661-666: four fixed offsets off view.debt.dueDate at 09:00 — (-3 days 'On due date'-3 => '3 days before due'), (0 'On due date'), (+3 'days overdue'), (+7 'Final follow-up'). status is inferred client-side (step date isBefore(now) => 'sent', else 'pending'). Reconciliation maps this to the backend reminder-engine schedule (conventions Reminder engine: 3 days before due -> due date -> +3 -> +7, stops on payment). Only shown when debt is not paid, not archived, and dueDate != null.

fields.name: offsetLabel
fields.type: string(3 days before due|On due date|3 days overdue|Final follow-up)

filtersOrSort: derived from debt.dueDate: offsets -3/0/+3/+7 days at 09:00

actions.name: recordPayment
actions.note: repo.recordPayment(debtId, amount, method). Fired by the 'Record payment' flow and by the overflow 'Close debt' option (which records a payment for the full view.remaining with method 'Settled outside OweMe'). Server mints the receipt reference (OWM-xxxxx). Stops the reminder schedule when balance reaches 0. Allowed for owner and staff.

actions.name: undoLastPayment
actions.note: repo.undoLastPayment(debtId) — the 'Reopen debt'/'undo' flow. Deletes the debt's most-recent payment (by createdAt desc) and returns the removed Payment so the UI can report what was undone. Reopens a settled debt. Allowed for owner and staff.

actions.name: restoreDebt
actions.note: repo.restoreDebt(debtId) — un-archives a soft-deleted debt (sets deleted=false). Shown only when debt.deleted. Allowed for owner and staff.

actions.name: updateDebt
actions.note: repo.updateDebt(debtId, amount, note, dueDate, clearDueDate) — 'Edit details' sheet. Partial update of core fields. clearDueDate=true explicitly nulls dueDate (distinct from an absent/unchanged dueDate). Allowed for owner and staff.

actions.name: deleteDebt
actions.note: repo.deleteDebt(debtId) — soft delete (sets deleted=true), gated behind a confirm dialog. Per conventions (Roles & permissions / S-4) staff CANNOT delete debts: owner only.

authContext.note: All reads + recordPayment/undoLastPayment/restoreDebt/updateDebt allowed for owner and staff (staff can read/write debts). deleteDebt is owner-only per conventions §Roles and supersede S-4. Every query is tenant-scoped by businessId.

special.note: Screen is built entirely on drift Streams via StreamBuilder (offline-first, watchDebt/watchPayments/watchDebtReminders/watchBusiness); reconciled by the sync layer (updatedAt/version, If-Match writes per conventions §Offline-first).

uiStatesHandled: not-found (snapshot.hasData but view == null -> 'Debt not found' EmptyState)
active/outstanding (Record payment primary + Remind/Receipt quick actions + auto-reminder schedule)
partial (three-figure panel: remaining hero / original / paid so far)
paid/settled ('Paid in full' panel, Send receipt, Reopen debt)
empty-payments guard (openLatestReceipt/reopen show 'no payments/no payment to undo' snackbars)
